testing_centers.notes: In-person test centers worldwide and online proctored via OnVUE

id_requirements: Two forms of ID are required. Primary ID must be government-issued, include candidate's name, photo, and signature (e.g. passport, driver's license). Secondary ID must include candidate's name and signature or name and photo.
exam_rules: No notes, scratch paper, electronic devices, books, or study materials permitted. Personal items must be stored. No food or drink except water. Restroom breaks allowed but timer continues. Testing center staff may monitor via video/audio.
renewal_options: Earn CE credits through CompTIA CE program (training, conferences, publishing, teaching, higher certs) or retake the current exam version before expiry.
target_audience: network operations specialist, systems administrator, enterprise architect, and security architect
recommended_experience: 2–3 years of hands-on experience as a systems administrator or cloud engineer

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period required before first retake. After the second failed attempt, candidates must wait 14 calendar days before any subsequent attempt. No limit on total attempts.

objectives.title: Cloud models
sub_objectives: Analyzing public, private, hybrid, and multi-cloud models to support business needs.

objectives.title: Virtualization
sub_objectives: Understanding virtualization technologies and their role in cloud environments.

objectives.title: Cloud networking
sub_objectives: Deploying solutions like virtual private networks (VPNs) and virtual networks.

objectives.title: Containerization
sub_objectives: Explaining containerization and its role in cloud environments.

objectives.title: Orchestration
sub_objectives: Managing containers using orchestration techniques.

objectives.title: Database fundamentals
sub_objectives: Exploring database concepts and their cloud applications.

objectives.title: Resource optimization
sub_objectives: Optimizing cloud resources for performance and cost efficiency.

objectives.title: Billing management
sub_objectives: Managing billing considerations for cloud usage.

objectives.title: System requirements
sub_objectives: Analyzing requirements for workload migrations.

objectives.title: Infrastructure as code (IaC)
sub_objectives: Implementing IaC techniques for automation.

objectives.title: Workload migrations
sub_objectives: Planning and executing migrations to cloud environments.

objectives.title: Resource provisioning
sub_objectives: Provisioning and configuring cloud resources effectively.

objectives.title: Lifecycle management
sub_objectives: Managing the lifecycle of cloud resources, including scaling and updates.

objectives.title: Backup and recovery
sub_objectives: Implementing strategies to ensure data integrity.

objectives.title: Observability
sub_objectives: Monitoring and analyzing cloud environments for performance optimization.

objectives.title: Vulnerability management
sub_objectives: Identifying and addressing vulnerabilities in cloud environments.

objectives.title: Identity and access management (IAM)
sub_objectives: Implementing IAM to control resource access.

objectives.title: Container security
sub_objectives: Safeguarding containerized applications and resources.

objectives.title: Compliance standards
sub_objectives: Ensuring compliance with standards like PCI DSS, SOC 2, and ISO 27001.

objectives.title: Security controls
sub_objectives: Deploying controls to protect cloud environments.

objectives.title: Automation
sub_objectives: Using tools to streamline cloud operations.

objectives.title: Source control
sub_objectives: Managing code with source control techniques.

objectives.title: CI/CD pipelines
sub_objectives: Building and managing continuous integration/continuous deployment pipelines.

objectives.title: System integration
sub_objectives: Integrating systems for seamless cloud operations.

objectives.title: DevOps tools
sub_objectives: Tools like Kubernetes, Ansible, and Jenkins are used for automation.

objectives.title: Event-driven architectures
sub_objectives: Exploring architectures for cloud applications.

objectives.title: Deployment issues
sub_objectives: Diagnosing and resolving deployment problems.

objectives.title: Network connectivity
sub_objectives: Troubleshooting connectivity issues in cloud environments.

objectives.title: Security incidents
sub_objectives: Addressing issues like leaked credentials and privilege escalation.

objectives.title: Service disruptions
sub_objectives: Resolving disruptions in services like DNS, DHCP, and NTP.

objectives.title: Misconfigurations
sub_objectives: Identifying and fixing misconfigurations in cloud setups.
